user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the time off management module using a Yes/No option, so that leave functionality is available only when the organization needs it.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the time off management module?"; Then the setting reflects my choice

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save the time off management setup, so that my enablement choice is persisted.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected an enablement option on the Setup screen; When I click Save; Then the configuration is saved

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can proceed through the time off setup flow efficiently.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I click Save & Next; Then my setting is saved and the next configuration step opens
